{"cards": [{"name": "Emberpack Warrior", "mana_cost": "{2}{R}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["R"], "color_identity": ["R"], "type_line": "Creature — Goblin Warrior", "oracle_text": "Haste
Menace", "flavor_text": ""Two paths forward, and I'll take both if I have to."", "power": "3", "toughness": "2", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Slot 11: Red common creature with keyword-only design. Haste + menace tests aggressive statlines at common. 3/2 for 3 is slightly above curve but justified by being purely aggressive keywords that don't provide card advantage. Red's color pie supports both keywords."}, {"name": "Worldrend Dragon", "mana_cost": "{4}{R}{R}{R}", "cmc": 7, "colors": ["R"], "color_identity": ["R"], "type_line": "Creature — Dragon", "oracle_text": "Flying, trample
When ~ enters the battlefield, ~ deals damage equal to its power to each creature and each planeswalker.
Whenever ~ attacks, you may sacrifice any number of lands. If you do, ~ gets +2/+0 for each land sacrificed this way until end of turn.", "flavor_text": null, "power": "6", "toughness": "6", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "mythic", "design_notes": "Slot 12: Red mythic dragon with multi-ability design. Tests splashy mythic effects - board-clearing ETB and sacrifice-for-power ability fits red's impulsive, destructive nature. High CMC justifies powerful effects. Flying and trample support the aggressive game plan."}, {"name": "Verdant Pilgrimage", "mana_cost": "{1}{G}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["G"], "color_identity": ["G"], "type_line": "Sorcery", "oracle_text": "Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.", "flavor_text": "The path to enlightenment begins with a single step into the wild.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Slot 13: Green common sorcery with single ability testing 'search your library' templating. Standard ramp effect at common - gets a basic land tapped, which is appropriate power level. Green's color pie strongly supports land tutoring and ramp effects."}, {"name": "Ironbark Trampler", "mana_cost": "{4}{G}{G}", "cmc": 6, "colors": ["G"], "color_identity": ["G"], "type_line": "Creature — Beast", "oracle_text": "Trample", "flavor_text": "It doesn't go around obstacles. It goes through them.", "power": "7", "toughness": "6", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Slot 14: Green common creature with keyword-only design testing common P/T ceiling. 7/6 for 6 mana with just trample pushes the upper limit for common creatures. The high CMC and single keyword keep it simple while providing a powerful late-game threat. Green's color pie supports large trampling creatures."}, {"name": "Symbiotic Growth", "mana_cost": "{2}{G}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["G"], "color_identity": ["G"], "type_line": "Enchantment", "oracle_text": "Whenever a creature enters the battlefield under your control, you may pay {1}. If you do, put a +1/+1 counter on that creature.
At the beginning of your end step, if you control four or more creatures, draw a card.", "flavor_text": null, "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "Slot 15: Green uncommon enchantment with multi-ability design. Tests enchantment templating with both triggered abilities and optional costs. First ability supports creature strategies with +1/+1 counters (green's wheelhouse), second provides card draw when going wide (conditional, appropriate for green). Multi-ability complexity fits uncommon rarity."}]}
